summary: Comprehensive testing completed for PHARMA-AI Formulation Optimizer platform. All core functionalities working correctly including backend APIs, frontend UI, and AI integration.

resolved_bugs.issue: JSON parsing error when processing GPT-4o responses with markdown code blocks
resolved_bugs.resolution: Fixed by implementing JSON cleanup to strip markdown formatting before parsing

passed_tests: Landing page loads with DNA helix and proper dark theme (#02060a)
Drug search autocomplete working ('Asp' shows Aspirin suggestion)
Analysis API call successfully triggered (POST /api/analyze with Aspirin 500mg)
All 4 analysis panels displayed: Solubility, Excipient, Stability, PK-Compatibility
Drug info bar shows SMILES, MW, BCS Class, LogP correctly
Export PDF button visible and clickable
Analysis saved to MongoDB and retrievable via GET /api/analyses
Error handling for invalid drug names (404 response)
GPT-4o AI integration working with 15-30 second response time
